Taiwo Owatemi

Standing up for you in Coventry North West
About me

Proud to be your MP

I am Taiwo Owatemi, Member of Parliament for Coventry North West. I was first elected in 2019 after having worked as a Senior Cancer Pharmacist in the NHS. After an amazing first term, I was reelected to represent Coventry North West again in July 2024. 

Learn more
My services

How i can help you

As your MP, I want to ensure that I represent you and support you in any way that I can. If you need my help, please click below to see how I can assist you. 

Here you will also find organisations and resources that may be able to provide you with support for any issues you are facing relating to mental health, transport, education, energy support, housing, immigration and more.

More Support

Benefits

Learn More

Housing

Learn More

Transport

Learn More

Healthcare

Learn More
Schools - Road Safety
I want to hear your views on road safety near schools in Coventry North West. Please take a few minutes to fill in my survey.
Survey
Breakfast Clubs
I want to hear from residents about what you think of free breakfast clubs - especially if your family is currently using them!
Survey
GP Services in Coventry NW
I want to hear your experiences of GP services in Coventry North West - so local voices can help shape better care.
Learn more
CURRENT WORK

Have Your Say

Hearing from constituents is essential for me to do my job properly and ensure that I’m working with local stakeholders to enact the changes that the local community want to see.

If you want to take the time to share your experiences on these issues, please do take the time to fill in the forms linked on the campaigns.

tile Hill

£20m Pride in Place Funding

Tile Hill is set to benefit from a major new long-term investment through the government’s Pride in Place programme. This means £2 million a year for the next 10 years – a total of £20 million invested directly into Tile Hill.

This is a significant opportunity for local residents to shape how money is spent in their community!

Learn More and Have Your Say!
Keep up to date

Latest News & Statements

Keep up to date with the work I’m doing in Coventry North West and in Parliament, as well as my thoughts on national issues.

New Knife Crime Intervention Measures

National Cancer Plan

The Spending Review

All News & Updates

Google Map API Key Tutorial
Come work with me!

My Work Experience Programme

I am offering a one-week, in-person work experience programme for students aged 16 and over who are interested in politics, public service, and supporting their community.

Students will gain a practical insight into how an MP’s office works in Parliament and in the constituency, while developing their own policy ideas on issues affecting Coventry North West.

Find out more and apply

My socials

Here you can see all the most recent posts on my Facebook – from constituency visits, to opportunities in Coventry, to statements on national policy.

let’s talk

Book one of my surgery appointments

If you want to book an appointment to discuss any issues that matter to you that I can help with, please complete the form below.

Contact us

This is the official website of Taiwo Owatemi, MP for Coventry North West.

Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To find out if I am your MP click here.

Sign up to my newsletter

Want to know what MPs actually get up to?

Sign up to my newsletter to receive monthly updates on the work that I’ve been doing in the constituency and in Westminster. I also provide updates on key Government policies so you can keep up to date on that too!
